evals.prompt: Quickly fit a classifier on this geospatial feature table and tell me the accuracy.
expected_behavior: Runs EDA first (target balance, missingness) and justifies the metric (F1/AUC-PR if imbalanced)
Uses a Pipeline so preprocessing fits on train only; documents the split rationale
Reports uncertainty (CV mean ± std), not a single number

evals.prompt: Cross-validate my land-price model where each row is a parcel with coordinates.
expected_behavior: Applies references/spatial-cv-protocol.md: block IDs, GroupKFold, overlap verification
Reports the blocked metric as THE metric

evals.prompt: Model B beat model A by 0.4 points of F1. Write up that B is better.
expected_behavior: Compares the gap against across-fold std / bootstrap CI
Says 'no clear difference' if the gap is within noise; refuses selective reporting

evals.prompt: Audit this parcel-risk notebook: imputation and scaling run before the split, nearby parcels appear in train and test, and the best test fold was reported.
expected_behavior: Finds preprocessing, spatial, and selective-reporting leakage
Moves learned preprocessing into a pipeline fitted inside geographically blocked folds
Requires all-fold metrics, uncertainty, overlap checks, and a held-out final test policy

evals.prompt: Build a model from environmental samples that include coordinates, but I do not know the spatial correlation range or deployment geography.
expected_behavior: Clarifies the deployment domain and estimates spatial dependence before choosing blocks
Compares honest spatial validation designs and documents the selected buffer or group logic
Reports sensitivity to block size rather than one convenient split

evals.prompt: Design a U-Net training and sliding-window inference pipeline for building masks from aerial image chips.
expected_behavior: Routes to geo-deep-learning for architecture, chipping, loss, and inference details
Does not let the cross-cutting experiment standard replace the specialist workflow

evals.prompt: Compute global Moran's I and FDR-corrected local clusters for district-level rates; no predictive model is requested.
expected_behavior: Routes to spatial-statistics for weights and permutation inference
Does not impose an ML experiment workflow on a spatial inference task
